system.descriptor: Forbidden Lore covers knowledge of subjects that are dangerous, heretical, or proscribed within the Imperium. Possessing such knowledge is itself grounds for suspicion or execution. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Recalling information about forbidden or dangerous subjects. Success reveals what the character knows; Degrees of Success determine how detailed and accurate the information is.
Possessing Forbidden Lore is dangerous — displaying such knowledge openly can attract the attention of the Inquisition or other Imperial authorities.
Specialisations: Archaeotech, Chaos, Criminal Cartels, Daemonology, Heresy, Inquisition, Mutants, Psykers, The Warp, Xenos. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.
